name: Máscaras de Oxigênio Não Cairão Automaticamente
original_name: Máscaras de Oxigênio Não Cairão Automaticamente
overview: 1988: A Brazilian flight attendant named Fernando jets between Rio and New York, loves many men, and lives life to the fullest. He ignores the fact that lots of people around him are contracting a mysterious illness. When he himself is diagnosed with HIV, he resolves to fight it. Taking a risk, he smuggles a drug out of the US and into Brazil, where it is illegal.

trailers.title: Trailer Oxygen Masks will (not) drop automatically (2025)
